zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston於1215年1月5日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，他的父親Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton26歲，母親Isabella de Patingham27歲。他和Margaret Somery至少有1個兒子。他於1264年被列為member of parliament 。他去世於1265年8月4日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston was born on 5 January 1215, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton, was 26 and his mother, Isabella de Patingham, was 27. He had at least 1 son with Margaret Somery. In 1264, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as member of parliament . He died on 4 August 1265, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston est né le 5 janvier 1215, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Patingham, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret Somery. En 1264, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament . Il est décédé le 4 août 1265, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Draton Basset, Staffordshire, England: Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston am 5. Januar 1215 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton 26 und seine Mutter Isabella de Patingham 27. Er hatte mit Margaret Somery mindestens 1 Sohn. 1264, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament  aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. August 1265 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston è nato il il 5 gennaio 1215 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Patingham, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Margaret Somery. Nel 1264, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament . Morì il 4 agosto 1265, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Evesham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colstonが1215年1月5日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Draytonは26歳，母Isabella de Patinghamは27歳であった。彼はMargaret Someryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。1264年，49歳の時，職業はmember of parliament と記録されている。彼は1265年8月4日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston(이)가 1215년 1월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Patingham(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Margaret Somery(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1264년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament 이었다. 그는 1265년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston nasceu em 5 de janeiro de 1215, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Patingham, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Margaret Somery. Em 1264, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament . Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1265, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston родился 5 января 1215 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Patingham, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margaret Somery. В 1264 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament . Он умер 4 августа 1265 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
